MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.

Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Ozgul Yolcu.
Amir Nassihi, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant(s): Celalettin Uzun.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304-B, for settlement discussions.
Case settled.
Matter is taken off calendar, Trial date vacated.
